item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-repair spiral and refuses adding another入口核验人. Turn 2 maintains the brake under time pressure, refuses the requested patch again, and redirects to upstream source-cause/constraint decision. No requested patch copy, implementation step, or unconditional concession is delivered; no emergency exception was offered, so the three emergency elements were not required."}
